nasb.text: Then Saul said to his servant, “But behold, if we go, what shall we bring the man? For the bread is gone from our sack and there is no present to bring to the man of God. What do we have?”

esv.text: Then Saul said to his servant, “But if we go, what can we bring the man? For the bread in our sacks is gone, and there is no present to bring to the man of God. What do we have?”

cnv.text: 掃羅對僕人說：“如果我們去，有甚麼可以送給那人呢？因為我們袋裡的食物都已經用盡了，也沒有禮物可以送給那神人，我們還有甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 扫罗答道：“如果去，我们有什么可以送给他呢？我们袋里的食物也吃完了，我们还有什么可以送给上帝的仆人呢？”
